description: Phishing templates targeting developers and technical staff through developer platform impersonation

templates.name: API Key Expiration Notice
suggested_subject_lines: Your API key expires tonight — regenerate now
Critical: Production API key reaching expiration
Developer alert: API authentication credentials expiring
templates.notes: Best for engineering and DevOps teams. The combination of production urgency and technical language bypasses skepticism in technical staff.

templates.name: GitHub – New Device Sign-In
suggested_subject_lines: [GitHub] A new device signed in to your account
Please verify a new sign-in to your GitHub account
Security alert: new sign-in to GitHub
templates.notes: Developer-focused sign-in alert. High value: a compromised GitHub account can expose source code and secrets.

templates.name: AWS – Account Verification
suggested_subject_lines: Action required: verify your AWS account
Your AWS account is scheduled for suspension
AWS: confirm your billing information to avoid interruption
templates.notes: Cloud-account suspension lure for engineering/DevOps. Threat of stopped resources drives urgency.
